'''Occo Ninebar''' was a [[Neelabi (species)|Neelabi]] [[Podracer/Legends|podracer]]. During his early life, he was exiled from his aquatic homeworld of [[Neelabi]]. Occo knew that the only way for him to return to Neelabi was if he became a [[Podracing/Legends|podracing]] champion. To fulfill this goal, Occo flew the ''[[Enser Flay 254]]'' which allowed him to remain enveloped in water during his races.
